plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to zero.
Trim QQQI, QQQ, SMH, and CRWD to reduce concentration.
Buy CVX, a scanner top pick, to add a quality energy name.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation and reduces overall risk.
It aims for a lower, steadier return with reduced volatility.
conservative.read: This conservative plan aims for modest monthly returns around 1.5%. It significantly reduces leverage and concentration, focusing on capital preservation with a larger cash buffer and lower drawdown potential.

plan: Trim SOXL and sell SPAL to reduce leveraged ETF exposure.
Reduce QQQI, QQQ, and SMH to lower concentration.
Add CVX and AVAV, strong scanner setups, for balanced growth.
This balanced approach aims for risk-first growth.
It blends index, quality tech, and some energy exposure.
balanced.read: This balanced plan targets around 2.5% monthly returns with a focus on risk-first growth. It reduces leverage and concentration while adding quality names, aiming for a moderate risk/reward profile with a smaller cash buffer.

plan: Increase SOXL to 10% and conditionally add SPAL.
Trim QQQI, QQQ, and SMH to reallocate capital.
Add CVX and AVAV, top scanner picks, for concentrated growth.
This aggressive plan aims for higher growth via leverage and concentration.
It accepts greater potential drawdown and daily leveraged ETF decay.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets ~4% monthly returns by increasing leverage and concentrating in high-conviction names. It accepts significantly higher potential drawdowns and the risks associated with leveraged ETFs, requiring strict stop discipline.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs and high-beta tech names (SOXL, SPAL, CRWD, SMH).
Increase QQQI significantly for income generation.
Maintain a core position in QQQ for broad market exposure.
Add CVX to further bolster income and stability.
This plan prioritizes reliable monthly distributions and low drawdown.
income.read: This income-focused plan targets ~1% monthly returns through distributions, prioritizing capital preservation and low volatility. It shifts away from growth and leverage towards income-generating assets and stable broad market exposure.
